channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Coalition urges creation of real-time fuel security dashboard amid Middle East tensions
item.description: The Coalition, led by Opposition Leader Angus Taylor, has called for a comprehensive fuel security dashboard to keep Australians informed about fuel availability and supply disruptions caused by the o...

item.title: Election Commission Transfers Tamil Nadu Chief Secretary and DGP Ahead of Assembly Polls
item.description: In preparation for the upcoming Tamil Nadu assembly elections on April 23, 2026, the Election Commission of India has transferred key state officials. The Chief Secretary, N Muruganandam, has been rep...

item.title: Tinubu sends message of support as Akpabio launches new projects in Lagos
item.description: President Bola Tinubu sent his goodwill message on April 8, 2026, as Senate President Godswill Akpabio represented him at the inauguration of multiple infrastructure projects in Lagos State. The proje...

item.title: Rapper Pooh Shiesty Remains in Custody Over Alleged Armed Robbery Linked to Gucci Mane’s Label
item.description: A federal judge in Dallas, Texas, has ordered rapper Pooh Shiesty, legally known as Lontrell Williams Jr., to remain in custody while facing charges related to an alleged armed robbery and kidnapping ...

item.title: UK Government Grants Approval for Springwell Solar Farm in Lincolnshire
item.description: The UK government has granted approval for the Springwell Solar Farm, set to become the largest power-producing solar facility in the country. Located between Lincoln and Sleaford, the solar farm is e...

item.title: Russia Adjusts Space Station Plans, Eyes Lunar Gateway Collaboration
item.description: Russia is significantly altering its plans for the Russian Orbital Station (ROS), a fully Russian space station initially intended to replace its involvement in the International Space Station (ISS). ...

item.title: Kind Neighbour Helps Shy Cabbage Seller Boost Sales in Nairobi
item.description: In Nairobi, a young cabbage seller was having a slow day because he was shy and couldn't attract customers to his handcart. A kind neighbour noticed his struggle and stepped in to help. He advised the...

item.title: Vancouver Goldeneyes Struggling Despite High Expectations: A Closer Look
item.description: The Vancouver Goldeneyes are facing a difficult season after a tough road trip that ended with a 5-1 loss to the Boston Fleet, marking their fourth loss in five games. The team, which had high expecta...

item.title: First Ships Cross Strait of Hormuz After Iran Reopens Passage as Part of Ceasefire Deal
item.description: After Iran agreed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as part of a new ceasefire arrangement with the United States, two ships don waka through the strategic waterway for the first time in weeks. MarineTra...

item.title: Naira Gains Slightly as Nigeria's Foreign Reserves Drop by $1.08bn

item.title: Supreme Court Observes Limits of Logic in Matters of Faith

item.title: Greg Norman recalls the 1996 Masters collapse
item.description: Greg Norman, the iconic Australian golfer, has recently reflected on one of the most heartbreaking moments of his career: the 1996 Masters Tournament. In this event, Norman was in a commanding positio...

item.title: Handmade Saskatchewan given 30 days to leave Saskatoon’s Midtown Mall location
item.description: A popular local business in Saskatchewan, Handmade Saskatchewan, has been asked to vacate its space at Midtown Mall in Saskatoon with only 30 days’ notice. The shop, which partners with regional artis...

item.title: 2026 Masters Preview: Favorites, Top Contenders, and Model Predictions for Augusta National
